changes.description: Meowtator Discord bot signup sheet display
changes.details: Fixed leader displayed twice in signup sheets by excluding leader status from role column filters, and fixed raid train duplicate user display by using userId_role deduplication key instead of just userId.
Added requester Discord ID tracking for signup sheets created from the app, with automatic DM notifications when sheets are published and automatic request status updates to 'closed'.

Replaced item level-based sorting with explicit sortOrder field for consistent raid progression display across Settings/Tracking, Settings/Raids, ToDo, and Dashboard. Cathedral now correctly appears as the newest raid at the bottom.
Added local time display with Discord timestamp below for ongoing events, improved leader display positioning, removed 'any' role option for raid-train runs, and included leaders in sign-up counts.
Fixed reminder message deletion timing to match signup messages, deduplicated users in raid-train reminders, and removed 'any' role option for raid-train category to prevent confusion.
Fixed leader counting to include lobby hosts in total sign-up counts for accurate capacity display, and prevented duplicate role assignments in raid-train pre-registration.
Added Level 1, Level 2, and Level 3 difficulties for the new Horizon Cathedral raid with appropriate gate rewards and item level requirements.

Temporarily disabled MeowConnect to reduce Supabase realtime message usage. Removed UI components, disabled backend handlers, and cleaned up database tables while preserving meow_profiles for authentication.
